operational_scenes.scene_title: Introduction to Tippers and Their Function
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain the role and design of tippers in the system
operational_intents: Describe tipper design and operator stations
Explain how tippers dump contents onto chutes
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract details on tipper design and operation
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Focus on tipper functionality and operator interaction

operational_scenes.scene_title: Process of Handling Items in the Chute
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Describe item handling and labeling process in the chute
operational_intents: Explain how items are placed and secured in the chute
Describe automatic label printing and containment
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract operational steps for chute item processing
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Clarify item handling and labeling workflow

operational_scenes.scene_title: Overview of Opti Sweep Software and Integration
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain software components and communication protocols
operational_intents: Explain use of Ignition OPC server and AVEVA integration
Discuss communication with camera tunnels and chat system
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract software architecture and communication details
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Understand system integration and data flow

operational_scenes.scene_title: Explanation of OPC Protocol and S Tunnel
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Clarify OPC protocol and S tunnel usage
operational_intents: Define OPC as an industry protocol
Explain purpose and function of S tunnel
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract protocol definitions and security rationale
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Clarify communication protocols and security measures

operational_scenes.primary_intent: Describe network segmentation and secure communication
operational_intents: Explain separation of OT net and UPS network
Discuss server and device network isolation
Clarify how order status is monitored across networks
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract network design and security practices
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Understand secure network segmentation and data flow
